allow: PowerShell(sqlcmd -S localhost,1433 -U sarawut -P "tttp@123" -d locomo -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'points' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION; SELECT i.name, i.is_unique, i.is_primary_key, STRING_AGG\(c.name, ', '\) as cols FROM sys.indexes i JOIN sys.index_columns ic ON ic.object_id=i.object_id AND ic.index_id=i.index_id JOIN sys.columns c ON c.object_id=i.object_id AND c.column_id=ic.column_id WHERE OBJECT_NAME\(i.object_id\)='points' GROUP BY i.name, i.is_unique, i.is_primary_key" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 0 } | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "node" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table)

PowerShell($port = 4001; $conn = netstat -ano | findstr ":$port"; $conn | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, CommandLine })
